_scene_summary: Stealth rescue. Compound with central building holding the captive. Two sentries near center, main force in/near the building. Crew sneaks in from far edge.
_tier1_bg_source: 5 Parsecs Core Rulebook/Art/png/General Art/Halflong-Lurking-p5.6.png (fits stealth theme) OR Dec_10_preparing_Ambush.png

_tier2_planned_actors.intent: central building, mid-background, lit from within
first sentry patrolling left of center
second sentry patrolling right of center
captive inside building, dimly seen through window
guards near building, default_visible: false until alarm raised

_tier2_planned_fx.intent: soft moonlight from above, night-stealth atmosphere
sentry searchlight, rotates via modulate animation

_animation_hints: FX searchlight_cone rotation animation via property tween (the most KoDP-feeling animation in the whole set)
Actor fade-in main_force when scene state = alarmed
Captive figure subtle modulate breathe to draw eye
